feasibility_findings.P2_followup_pr: The C-27 guards diff a2l.py vs the `main` ref (test_engine_unchanged.py:154/161; test_tui_directionb.py:5961/5977). Re-freezing a2l.py in the SAME PR that edits it trips the guard (branch a2l.py != main a2l.py until merge). => P-2 executes as a guard-files-only follow-up PR-B cut off MERGED main (zero a2l.py source diff). This is the operator's 'edits first, re-freeze last'.
feasibility_findings.P1b_structural: _infer_length_characteristic (a2l.py:1056 call) runs BEFORE the AXIS_DESCR child walk (a2l.py:1061); axis_meta not yet available inside it => Phase-1 must reorder or add a post-walk length pass.
feasibility_findings.P1b_frozen_tests: P-1b tests must NOT land in test_tui_a2l.py (frozen by tc032/C-27) -> route to a non-frozen sibling (test_a2l_record_layout_length.py or a new test_a2l_curve_map_length.py).
feasibility_findings.P1b_multiline_header_BLOCKER: DRAFT-TIME EXECUTION FINDING (2026-07-19): parse_characteristic_header (a2l.py:324-330) requires all 7 mandatory CHARACTERISTIC params on ONE line (len(parts)<7 -> None). The real ASAM demo (ASAP2_Demo_V161.a2l) uses MULTI-LINE headers -> 49/50 CHARACTERISTICs parse char_type=None/length=None/record_layout_name=None; axis_meta captures only ['STD_AXIS'] (MaxAxisPoints=8 on a separate line NOT captured). PRE-EXISTING limitation (P-1 scalar derivation also no-ops on the demo - only worked on crafted single-line-header fixtures _CASE_01_A2L). => P-1b's Acceptance headline 'demo STD_AXIS CURVE -> 25B green' is UNREALIZABLE as written. P-1b logic is still correct+valuable but delivers NO real-world demo win until multi-line-header parsing is separately fixed. Options for operator: (A) proceed, validate P-1b on crafted single-line-header A2L (P-1 precedent; correct, incremental, no demo win yet); (B) expand scope to add multi-line CHARACTERISTIC header parsing (bigger, touches core header parser); (C) defer P-1b until header parsing fixed. Needs operator decision at Phase-2 gate.
